title: boscia polyantha
intro: Boscia polyantha, also known as the Desert Ironwood, is a small tree or shrub that belongs to the Sapindaceae family. It is native to the deserts of southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boscia polyantha include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce pain and inflammation, and even have antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
